name: Cranberry Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Look for bright, plump cranberries, avoiding soft, crushed, or shriveled ones.
2. Store in the refrigerator for 4-8 weeks (can also be frozen), but do not wash them until ready for use as moisture will cause spoilage.
3. Rinse the cranberries and chop in a blender.
4. Combine all ingredients in a jar and steep for 4-5 weeks.
5. Strain and filter.
6. Ready to serve.
Note: Cranberries can have a bitter taste; more sugar syrup can be added during the first steep or if needed, let sit an additional week.
